message:
chore: add comprehensive style tests and update docs

- Add additional tests for 100% style attribute coverage
- Add tests for blink2, frame, encircle, underline2 attributes
- Add tests for short aliases (r, c, s, d, i, u, b, o)
- Update UPGRADE_LOG.md date and test status

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
